CustomField.formula: /* check first 3 character of type__c */ case( LEFT(Text(leaseworks__Type__c),3), 'LLP' ,null ,'Hea' , Text(leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__Event_Phase__c) ,'C-C' , Text(leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__Event_Phase__c) ,'Oth' , Text(leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__Event_Phase__c) , Text(leaseworks__Assembly__r.leaseworks__Event_Phase__c ) )
CustomField.label: Event Phase
